title: Add restore and launch smoke runbook
goal: Make launch, rollback, and backup restore verification repeatable with safe operational scripts.
scope: Add a production-safe PostgreSQL restore helper with explicit destructive confirmation.
Add a reusable smoke-check script for deployed environments.
Document restore drills against staging before relying on backups.
Document smoke checks in launch and rollback flows.
verification: Restore script refuses to run without explicit confirmation.
Smoke script validates API health, MCP auth rejection, and crawler/GEO assets.
completed_notes: Added deploy/compose/restore-postgres.sh with pre-restore backup and explicit confirmation guard.
Added deploy/compose/smoke-check.sh for deployed environment checks.
Updated Compose, CI/CD, and GCP deployment docs with restore and smoke-check usage.
